tech-stack.ui-library: Chakra UI 2.8+ (Box, Flex, Drawer, Modal, IconButton, useBreakpointValue, useDisclosure)

acceptance-criteria.ac: Bottom nav bar visible on mobile (<768px) with 5 tabs: Dashboard, Transactions, Add, Insights, Settings. Hidden on tablet/desktop.
Center "Add" tab is elevated; tapping it opens transaction entry modal (replaces FAB on mobile).
Swipe-left on transaction list item reveals Delete action; swipe-right reveals Edit action. Both require confirmation.
Pull-to-refresh on transaction list and dashboard triggers SWR revalidation with spinner.
All interactive touch targets are minimum 48×48px on mobile.
Haptic feedback via navigator.vibrate(50) on successful transaction save; no-op if unsupported.
Amount input uses inputMode="decimal"; date inputs use type="date". (Already implemented in TransactionEntryModal)
Transaction entry modal uses bottom sheet (Chakra Drawer placement="bottom") on mobile; centered Modal on desktop.
If transaction count >100, implement windowed rendering for 60fps scroll.
Responsive breakpoints consistent: mobile <768px, tablet 768–1024px, desktop >1024px.
Unit/component tests for: BottomNav, Add tab modal trigger, touch targets, haptic utility, inputMode.

artifact.role: Root layout shell for all dashboard pages. Contains Header, Sidebar, MobileNav (Drawer), FloatingActionButton, TransactionEntryModal, PWAInstallPrompt.
artifact.key-details: - handleOpenModal / handleCloseModal / handleSuccess (mutates SWR dashboard keys) - FAB: <FloatingActionButton onClick={handleOpenModal} /> — currently always visible, must be hidden on mobile (<768px) - MobileNav: <MobileNav isOpen={isMobileNavOpen} onClose={onMobileNavClose} /> — hamburger drawer from left; remains for tablet - Main content Box: p={{ base: 4, md: 6 }}, overflowY="auto" - Must add: <BottomNav onAddClick={handleOpenModal} /> and bottom padding pb={{ base: '72px', md: 0 }} on main content

artifact.role: Fixed bottom-right FAB, zIndex=1000, 60×60px. Uses useOnlineStatus for disable state.
artifact.key-details: - position="fixed", bottom={{ base: '20px', md: '32px' }}, right={{ base: '20px', md: '32px' }} - Must add: display={{ base: 'none', md: 'flex' }} to hide on mobile where BottomNav Add tab takes over

artifact.role: Hamburger drawer navigation sliding from left. Used on tablet (768–1024px). Remains unchanged.
artifact.key-details: - navItems: Dashboard(/dashboard, ViewIcon), Transactions(/transactions, EditIcon), Categories(/categories, AtSignIcon), Insights(/insights, InfoIcon), Settings(/settings, SettingsIcon) - usePathname() for active state; isActive uses trustBlue.500 - BottomNav should mirror these nav items (minus Categories; Story spec says: Dashboard, Transactions, Add, Insights, Settings)

artifact.role: Transaction create/edit modal. Currently uses Chakra Modal with size={{ base: 'full', md: 'xl' }}.
artifact.key-details: - Props: isOpen, onClose, onSuccess?, mode ('create'|'edit'), transaction? - Already has: inputMode="decimal" on amount input (AC-10.8.7 partial), type="date" on date input - onSuccess callback fires after successful save — add triggerHaptic(50) here (AC-10.8.6) - MODIFY: detect mobile with useBreakpointValue({ base: true, md: false }); on mobile use Chakra Drawer placement="bottom"; on desktop keep existing Modal - Props contract must NOT change

artifact.role: Pattern/template for new haptic.ts utility (same guard pattern for browser API).
artifact.key-details: - isBadgeSupported(): checks typeof navigator and API presence - New haptic.ts should follow same pattern: typeof navigator !== 'undefined' and 'vibrate' in navigator

file.description: 5-tab bottom navigation bar. Fixed at viewport bottom, full-width, display={{ base: 'flex', md: 'none' }}, zIndex=100. Center "Add" tab is elevated (circle button, bg="trustBlue.500", mt="-16px"). Uses usePathname() for active state. All tabs min 48×48px. Calls onAddClick prop for Add tab. Includes paddingBottom="env(safe-area-inset-bottom)" for iOS home indicator.
triggerHaptic(pattern?) wrapping navigator.vibrate with guard for unsupported browsers.
Custom hook tracking touch events. Fires callback when pull distance >80px from top of scroll container. Only activates at scrollTop===0. Uses overscroll-behavior-y: contain.

installed.dep: @chakra-ui/react 2.8+ — Drawer (placement="bottom"), Modal, useBreakpointValue, IconButton, Box, Flex
@chakra-ui/icons 2.2+ — ViewIcon, EditIcon, AtSignIcon, InfoIcon, SettingsIcon, AddIcon
framer-motion 10 — available but not needed for swipe (use raw CSS transforms)

not-installed.dep: @tanstack/react-virtual — NOT in package.json. Only install if transaction count check reveals >100 items commonly (AC-10.8.9 says check first). Can implement simple manual windowing as alternative.

implementation-notes.note: BottomNav layout: HStack full-width, fixed bottom, bg="white", borderTop="1px solid", borderColor="gray.200", height="56px", zIndex=100, px=2, safeAreaBottom. Tab items: VStack icon+label, minH="48px", minW="48px", flex=1, as Link. Add tab: Box positioned relative; IconButton with borderRadius="full", w="48px", h="48px", bg="trustBlue.500", color="white", mt="-24px", boxShadow="md". NOT a link, calls onAddClick. Active color: trustBlue.500; inactive: gray.500.

In TransactionEntryModal: const isMobile = useBreakpointValue({ base: true, md: false }) ?? false; If isMobile: render Chakra Drawer (isOpen, onClose, placement="bottom", size="full"). Add drag handle at top: Box w="40px" h="4px" bg="gray.300" borderRadius="full" mx="auto" mt={2} mb={2}. If !isMobile: render existing Modal (unchanged). Import Drawer, DrawerOverlay, DrawerContent, DrawerBody, DrawerHeader, DrawerCloseButton from @chakra-ui/react.

On transaction list row component: add touch event handlers using useRef for gesture state (no re-renders during swipe). State refs: touchStartX, touchStartY, currentTranslateX, isSwiping. onTouchStart: record startX, startY. onTouchMove: compute deltaX, deltaY. If |deltaY| > |deltaX|: cancel (normal scroll). Else apply translateX CSS transform. onTouchEnd: if |translateX| > 60px: reveal action. Else snap back. CSS: transform: translateX({x}px), transition applied only on snap-back. Revealed panel: absolute positioned behind row, revealed by transform. Delete (swipe left): red bg, trash icon. Edit (swipe right): blue bg, edit icon. Desktop: no touch handlers added (mouse events don't trigger touch events).

usePullToRefresh(ref, callback): - Attach to scroll container element via ref - onTouchStart: record startY if scrollTop === 0 - onTouchMove: if pulling down and scrollTop === 0, prevent default, update indicator position - onTouchEnd: if pullDistance > 80px, call callback, show spinner - Add overscroll-behavior-y: "contain" to scroll container style - Returns: isPulling boolean, pullDistance number

For AC-10.8.9: First check transaction count. If typical page shows 20-50 items (with pagination), virtualization may not be needed. The transactions page already has PaginationControls — if pagination limits to 20-50 per page, 100-item threshold is not reached and virtualization can be skipped. If virtualization IS needed: @tanstack/react-virtual with estimateSize of 72px per row.

Standard breakpoints: base (mobile <768px), md (tablet 768px+), lg (desktop 1024px+). Chakra default breakpoints: sm=480px, md=768px, lg=992px, xl=1280px. BottomNav hides at md (768px+). Sidebar shows at md (768px+). FAB hides at base (shows at md+).

Test file locations: src/components/layout/__tests__/BottomNav.test.tsx, src/lib/utils/__tests__/haptic.test.ts, src/hooks/__tests__/usePullToRefresh.test.ts. Mock usePathname: jest.mock('next/navigation', () => ({ usePathname: jest.fn(() => '/dashboard') })). Mock navigator.vibrate: Object.defineProperty(navigator, 'vibrate', { value: jest.fn(), writable: true }).
